detectors.description:
Reentrancy in CommunityPolice._transfer(address,address,uint256) (CommunityPolice.sol#435-499):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (CommunityPolice.sol#481)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (CommunityPolice.sol#513-525)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (CommunityPolice.sol#487)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (CommunityPolice.sol#563)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (CommunityPolice.sol#497)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (CommunityPolice.sol#651)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (CommunityPolice.sol#631)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (CommunityPolice.sol#633)
	CommunityPolice._rOwned (CommunityPolice.sol#235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CommunityPolice._takeTeam(uint256) (CommunityPolice.sol#645-653)
	- CommunityPolice._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (CommunityPolice.sol#627-641)
	- CommunityPolice.balanceOf(address) (CommunityPolice.sol#353-357)
	- CommunityPolice.constructor() (CommunityPolice.sol#303-317)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (CommunityPolice.sol#497)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (CommunityPolice.sol#659)
	CommunityPolice._rTotal (CommunityPolice.sol#251) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CommunityPolice._getCurrentSupply() (CommunityPolice.sol#751-761)
	- CommunityPolice._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (CommunityPolice.sol#657-663)
	- CommunityPolice.constructor() (CommunityPolice.sol#303-317)
	- CommunityPolice.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (CommunityPolice.sol#409-417)
